claudeMd: Before implementation, review, planning, release, or version-control work in a repository, read .claude/governance.json and invoke enterprise-governance:governance-profile-router. Apply only the resolved profile stack. If no repository profile is declared, apply the engineering foundation only and report the missing declaration. When the user requests a pause, handoff, saved state, or later resumption, invoke engineering-foundation:session-handoff. Before resuming from a handoff, run its staleness check and complete the resume checklist before editing application files.
